prompt:
Write Python: a `Trie` class with:
- `insert(word: str)` — add a word
- `search(word: str) -> bool` — return True if word exists exactly
- `starts_with(prefix: str) -> bool` — return True if any word starts with prefix

Use nested dicts internally. Mark word ends with a sentinel key.

tests.code:
t = Trie()
t.insert('apple')
assert t.search('apple') == True

t = Trie()
t.insert('apple')
assert t.search('app') == False

t = Trie()
t.insert('apple')
assert t.starts_with('app') == True

t = Trie()
t.insert('apple')
t.insert('app')
assert t.search('app') == True

t = Trie()
assert t.search('anything') == False
assert t.starts_with('any') == False
